content: We can reframe Autonomous Agents to use LightRAG as a 'retrieval-based working memory' that encodes only high-relevance, light-weight relational knowledge rather than storing entire raw observation histories, letting agents navigate open-ended tasks with lower compute overhead and reduced distraction from irrelevant context. This architecture mimics how human cognition prioritizes salient relational connections over complete sensory recall to keep decision-making efficient.
